message:
feat(redact-memo): audit-emitting + invalidate/quarantine surface [coding_agent_session_search-ibuuh.34]

Closes the bead's "operator-auditable through structured hit, miss,
invalidation, eviction, quarantine, and budget logs" requirement for
the redaction sink. The previous slice (9d87c766) added the cache;
this slice routes every cache decision through audit-emitting
ContentAddressedMemoCache operations and lights up structured
tracing per decision.

What landed:
- redact_text now delegates to redact_text_with_audit, which returns
  the redacted text plus a Vec<MemoCacheAuditRecord> that telemetry
  sinks / doctor diagnostics can consume directly.
- Quarantined-entry fallthrough: a Quarantined lookup outcome
  triggers a direct redact_text regex pass (so user-visible output is
  always correct) WITHOUT re-inserting under the quarantined key
  (operator can inspect the quarantine reason until it's lifted).
- New invalidate(input) -> bool surface: returns true only when an
  entry was actually removed (matches the underlying cache contract).
  Empty input is a no-op.
- New quarantine(input, reason) surface: marks an entry as poisoned
  so subsequent lookups fall through to direct regex. Re-quarantining
  the same key with the same reason is a no-op for the counter.
- trace_audit() emits structured tracing per cache decision with
  severity tiered to operator expectations:
  - hit  → trace (noise)
  - miss / insert → debug (routine)
  - evict → info (noteworthy)
  - invalidate / quarantine → warn (alarming, surfaces in default-level logs)
  All events carry algorithm + algorithm_version key fields so a
  shared logger target can disambiguate per-cache events.

Three new equivalence + audit + lifecycle gates:
- memoizing_redactor_with_audit_emits_lookup_and_insert_records pins
  the audit record sequence (Lookup(Miss) + Insert on first call;
  Lookup(Hit) on second) and the algorithm/algorithm_version fields.
- memoizing_redactor_invalidate_drops_cached_entry pins
  invalidate's true-on-removal / false-on-no-op contract, the
  invalidation counter, and the post-invalidate miss vs hit
  semantics. Also pins empty-input invalidate is a no-op.
- memoizing_redactor_quarantined_entries_fall_through_to_direct_redaction
  pins that quarantine never serves cached values, that fallthrough
  still scrubs secrets via direct regex, that re-quarantining is
  idempotent, and that empty-input quarantine is a no-op.

25/25 src/indexer/redact_secrets.rs lib tests green via
rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/rch_target_cass_p2 cargo test
--lib indexer::redact_secrets.

Combined with the prior 9d87c766 slice and the 34.1/34.2 child beads
already closed, the ibuuh.34 acceptance bullets ("memo keys combine
content + algorithm version", "operator-auditable through structured
logs", "covers repeated-content + version bumps + invalidation +
compare-mode + quarantine + bounded storage") are now all met for the
redaction sink. Wiring into map_to_internal call sites in
indexer/mod.rs is the next slice (BlueRabbit-locked).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
